infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow NeoTherm to use the microphone for MoCA speech tasks and Voice Check-In.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow NeoTherm to transcribe your spoken responses during the MoCA cognitive assessment.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow NeoTherm to set your home area from your current location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow NeoTherm to estimate time at home and outside home using low-power home boundary events, even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Allow NeoTherm to connect to the Metro development server on your local network during development.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NeoTherm to record brief voice samples for Voice Check-In as part of your care program.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow NeoTherm to set your home area from your current location.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow NeoTherm to estimate time at home and outside home using low-power home boundary events, even when the app is closed.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow NeoTherm to estimate time at home and outside home using low-power home boundary events, even when the app is closed.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Allow NeoTherm to read steps and flights climbed from Apple Health for your recovery dashboard.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: NeoTherm does not write health data to Apple Health.

plugins.motionPermission: NeoTherm uses low-movement verification to estimate overnight sleep while you are at home. Step counts are not stored or sent to a server.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NeoTherm to use the microphone for MoCA speech tasks and Voice Check-In.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow NeoTherm to transcribe your spoken responses during the MoCA cognitive assessment.
